hook.headline: Sora 2 prompts that don't suck — start in Higgsfield, finish in Sora.

cards.label: 01 · pattern
cards.title: Pick the shot before the scene.
cards.body: Most Sora prompts fail because they describe what's happening, not how the camera sees it. Pick the camera move first: dolly, orbit, push-in, crash-zoom. Then describe what's in frame.

cards.label: 02 · tool
cards.title: Higgsfield has the shot library.
cards.body: Higgsfield lets you pick the camera move from a preset library — dolly, drone, handheld, whip-pan — before you write the prompt. Use it to storyboard. Then re-generate the final in Sora for cinema quality.

cards.label: 03 · prompt
cards.title: The 3-part formula.
cards.body: 1) Camera move ('slow dolly-in on...'). 2) Subject + action ('a barista pulling an espresso shot'). 3) Lighting + mood ('warm morning window light, shallow focus').

cards.label: 04 · price
cards.title: Sora is $20 to start, $200 to live in.
cards.body: ChatGPT Plus ($20/mo) gives ~50 short Sora clips. ChatGPT Pro ($200/mo) gives ~500 clips at 1080p, 20-sec. Most creators waste credits on bad prompts — get them right in Higgsfield first.

cards.label: 05 · stack
cards.title: The cheap stack: Kling + Hailuo.
cards.body: If $20/mo is too much, Kling 2.5 (~$10/mo) and Hailuo (~$10/mo) deliver 80% of Sora quality at 5-10× lower cost. Pair with Higgsfield for camera control. Best price-to-quality combo in 2026.

take.use_if: You're making short-form video and tired of getting random outputs from prose prompts.
take.skip_if: You're doing single one-off generations — the storyboard step isn't worth it for a one-shot.

cta.sub: every model · every price · every limit
